description: The AI moderator's prompt text is progressively revealed on the screen.
User hovers over the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab, triggering a tab preview.
User navigates to the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' prototype tab.
User scrolls down and then back up through the list of research tasks and sessions in the prototype.
User navigates back to the 'Askable Sessions' tab.
A browser feature tooltip ('Split view makes it easier to multitask') appears on the page.
